productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Worden Navy Blue Tshirts
description: "Mail By Aniket Keshi & Syed, on 25 April 2012" Composition Navy blue pique polo neck t-shirt with red stripes sandwiched between white stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar and cuffs, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, a vented hem and embroidered brand logo on left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Stripes that add immense style to your casual look is what indian terrain brings into your life with its Bright Lit Polo collection. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish Worden t-shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The ribbed sleeve hems sit snug on well toned arms, and the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit around the waist. Pair it with denims or corduroys and Sports or suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6& rsquo Shoulders: 18& rdquo
